mapper.select:
select oi.onboarding_id as onboardingId, oi.company_id as companyId, oi.employee_id as employeeId,
ep.user_id as employeeUserId, ep.manager_user_id as managerUserId,
st.survey_template_id as templateId, st.name as templateName, st.stage as stage, st.target_role as targetRole,
case when upper(st.target_role) = 'EMPLOYEE' then ep.user_id when upper(st.target_role) = 'MANAGER' then ep.manager_user_id else null end as responderUserId,
( oi.start_date + case when upper(st.stage) = 'D7' then interval '7 day' when upper(st.stage) = 'D30' then interval '30 day' when upper(st.stage) = 'D60' then interval '60 day' else interval '0 day' end ) as scheduledAt,
( oi.start_date + case when upper(st.stage) = 'D7' then interval '7 day' when upper(st.stage) = 'D30' then interval '30 day' when upper(st.stage) = 'D60' then interval '60 day' else interval '0 day' end + interval '7 day' ) as closedAt
from onboarding_instances oi
join employee_profiles ep on ep.employee_id = oi.employee_id and ep.company_id = oi.company_id
join survey_templates st on st.company_id = oi.company_id
where st.status = 'ACTIVE' and st.is_default = true and upper(st.stage) in ('D7', 'D30', 'D60') and upper(st.target_role) in ('EMPLOYEE', 'MANAGER')
and oi.start_date is not null and oi.employee_id is not null and upper(oi.status) in ('ACTIVE', 'IN_PROGRESS', 'INPROGRESS')
and ( oi.start_date + case when upper(st.stage) = 'D7' then interval '7 day' when upper(st.stage) = 'D30' then interval '30 day' when upper(st.stage) = 'D60' then interval '60 day' else interval '0 day' end ) <= #{now}
and ( case when upper(st.target_role) = 'EMPLOYEE' then ep.user_id when upper(st.target_role) = 'MANAGER' then ep.manager_user_id else null end ) is not null
and not exists ( select 1 from survey_instances si where si.company_id = oi.company_id and si.onboarding_id = oi.onboarding_id and si.survey_template_id = st.survey_template_id and si.responder_user_id = case when upper(st.target_role) = 'EMPLOYEE' then ep.user_id when upper(st.target_role) = 'MANAGER' then ep.manager_user_id else null end and si.status <> 'CANCELLED' )
order by oi.start_date asc, st.stage asc, st.target_role asc limit #{limit}
mapper.insert: insert into survey_instances ( survey_instance_id, company_id, onboarding_id, survey_template_id, responder_user_id, scheduled_at, closed_at, status, created_at, updated_at ) select #{surveyInstanceId}, #{companyId}, #{onboardingId}, #{templateId}, #{responderUserId}, #{scheduledAt}, #{closedAt}, 'SCHEDULED', now(), now() where not exists ( select 1 from survey_instances si where si.company_id = #{companyId} and si.onboarding_id = #{onboardingId} and si.survey_template_id = #{templateId} and si.responder_user_id = #{responderUserId} and si.status <> 'CANCELLED' )
